form_name: O2C - Sales Order Management - Intra Intercompany

questions.text: What is the purpose of the "Customer Care Journey (CCJ)" tool in the NEO system?
options: To handle outbound delivery creation
To manage the order validation and order status tracking
To process invoices and financial reports
To manage customer service feedback

questions.text: Which sales order type is used for internal free delivery within the organization?
options: ZFOE
ZEXP
ZFOI
YKW1

questions.text: What does the "Requested Delivery Date (RDD)" represent in a sales order?
options: The date when the goods are confirmed for shipment
The date proposed by the customer to receive the goods
The date the order is closed
The date the invoice is generated

questions.text: What is the purpose of the "Free Delivery Workflow" in the NEO system?
options: To automate invoice generation for free orders
To manage approvals for free delivery orders
To handle customer disputes for free products
To update customer master data

questions.text: What should be included in the header of a free delivery order (ZFOI)?
options: Customer invoice number
Order reason and cost center assignment
Requested Delivery Date
Delivery priority code
